name: Northwest Cheesecake Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker curls, sugar, and margarine in a bowl. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch spring form pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
3. In another bowl, beat together the cream cheese, sugar, and flour until well blended.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. Stir in the sour cream and vanilla extract.
6. Pour the mixture over the crust.
7. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
8. Reduce the temperature to 250 degrees Fahrenheit and continue baking for another hour.
9. Carefully loosen the cake from the rim of the pan, then allow it to cool before removing the rim.
10. Chill completely before topping with cherry pie filling just before serving.
Variation:
For a variation, substitute finely chopped nuts (1 1/2 cups) and additional sugar (2 tablespoons) for the graham cracker curls and sugar in the crust.
